'''âm-r-v-l''' ('''kamarveloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:telephone|telephone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-v-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:telephone|telephone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-r-v-l
|-
! Lemma
| kamarveloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimarveloko|thimarveloko]] || [[word:jimarveloko|jimarveloko]] || [[word:shimarveloko|shimarveloko]] || [[word:kimarveloko|kimarveloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
